subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy call and the supplication of him who inscribed thy letter have attained the honor of being heard by the Best-Beloved of the worlds. The mercy of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ندایت و ندای راقم کتابت بشرف اصغای محبوب عالم فائز شد رحمت حق
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
